description: Perform an informative hypothesis test using the Bain module in JASP to confirm a specific dose-response relationship using the dataset /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv. Conduct a Bain ANOVA with 'len' as the Dependent Variable and 'dose' as the Fixed Factor. Test the specific hypothesis that tooth length increases with dose (dose 2.0 > dose 1.0 > dose 0.5). Save the analysis as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth_Bain.jasp and record the resulting Bayes Factor (BF.c or BF10) in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/bain_report.txt.
